title: Electrons, energy levels and atomic orbitals
summary: 9701 AS — shells, subshells, orbitals, and electron configurations.
learningObjectives: Explain orbital shapes at syllabus level.

simpleExplanation.title: Where electrons live
simpleExplanation.summary: Electrons occupy quantised energy levels split into subshells and orbitals. Configuration determines chemical behaviour.
steps: s holds 2; p holds 6; d holds 10.

sections.content: **Atomic orbitals** (1.3) supports **1.4 ionisation energy** and **periodicity**. Use the **Build an Atom** sim to visualise filling.
